areaName: Loh Dalum Bay, Koh Phi Phi

neighborhood.name: Loh Dalum Bay, Koh Phi Phi
neighborhood.description: Loh Dalum Bay is a shallow beach area on Koh Phi Phi Don connected to Tonsai by a short walk. It hosts fire shows and gatherings in the evenings. The bay is surrounded by cliffs and accessible by foot from the main village.

paaQuestions: What is the best part of Phi Phi Island to stay?
Which is the best part of Krabi to stay in?
Is it better to stay in Krabi or Koh Phi Phi?
What is the best time to visit Pee Pee island?

aiContent.hookIntro: Picking the wrong spot in Loh Dalum Bay, Koh Phi Phi can leave you isolated from the evening fire shows and bars — most first-timers overlook the short walk from Tonsai and end up missing the action.
aiContent.intro: Loh Dalum Bay stands out on Koh Phi Phi Don for its shallow beachfront buzzing with evening gatherings and fire shows, connected easily by foot to the main village. We ranked it highly for nightlife seekers, evaluating based on accessibility, party vibe, and value in the €–€€ range.

quickStats.safetyNote: Safe, watch belongings in evening crowds.

aiContent.detailedDescription: In Loh Dalum Bay, travelers navigate a compact sandy stretch flanked by steep cliffs, where the shallow waters invite casual wading during the day. Locals and seasonal workers from nearby Tonsai run the beach bars and guesthouses, serving up cold Chang beers and basic Thai fried rice to backpackers and groups in their 20s. Mornings feel quiet with just a few early risers strolling the shore or heading out on longtail boats for island hops to spots like Monkey Beach. By afternoon, the area picks up as day-trippers arrive via foot from Tonsai, about a 10-minute walk across the narrow isthmus. Evenings transform it into the island's party hub: fire shows light up the beach around 9 PM, drawing crowds to juggle performances and impromptu dances, with bass-heavy music from open-air bars echoing until midnight or later. Noise levels spike then, making it tough for light sleepers, but the energy suits those chasing social scenes. Food options stick to grilled seafood skewers and pad Thai from beachside stalls, nothing fancy, with prices holding steady at 100-200 THB per meal. Getting around means walking the flat paths or hiring longtail boats for 500-1000 THB to explore beyond the bay; no cars or motos disrupt the pedestrian flow. Ferries dock at Tonsai, so arrivals involve that quick trek with luggage.
localSignals: Walking distance from Tonsai Village: 10 minutes.
Longtail boat from Krabi mainland: 1500-2000 THB per person roundtrip.
Distance to Loh Dalum Beach: 0-5 minutes walk from bay center.
Noise level at night: loud from fire shows and bars until 1 AM.
pros: Easy access to evening fire shows
cons: Loud music disrupts sleep after 10 PM
Shallow water limits swimming at low tide
No direct ferry dock in the bay
aiContent.skipIf: Skip if you're traveling with young kids or seeking quiet relaxation away from party noise.

compareTo.shortPitch: Ao Nang offers more resort-style stays and direct beach access without the intense party focus of Loh Dalum Bay.
Railay provides secluded cliffs and rock climbing over Loh Dalum Bay's social beach gatherings.
Krabi Town has urban markets and cheaper eats compared to Loh Dalum Bay's touristy bar scene.

aiContent.travellerNote: Travellers often praise the electric atmosphere of fire shows and easy beach access but note the persistent noise and overcrowding during peak evenings.

faq.q: What is the best part of Phi Phi Island to stay?
faq.a: Loh Dalum Bay suits nightlife lovers with its fire shows and bars, but Tonsai Village is better for central access to ferries and shops. Consider your priorities for partying versus convenience.

faq.q: Which is the best part of Krabi to stay in?
faq.a: For beach vibes, Ao Nang or Railay Beach top the list over mainland spots like Krabi Town. Loh Dalum Bay on Koh Phi Phi excels if you want island parties.

faq.q: Is it better to stay in Krabi or Koh Phi Phi?
faq.a: Koh Phi Phi like Loh Dalum Bay is ideal for immersive island nightlife, while Krabi mainland offers easier access to multiple beaches. Choose Phi Phi for parties, Krabi for variety.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Phi Phi island?
faq.a: November to April brings dry weather perfect for Loh Dalum Bay's beach activities and fire shows. Avoid rainy season May-October to dodge rough seas and closures.

faq.q: How do I get to Loh Dalum Bay from Krabi Airport?
faq.a: Take a taxi to Ao Nang pier for a ferry to Tonsai, then walk 10 minutes; total time is 2-3 hours. Book ferries in advance during high season.

faq.q: Is Loh Dalum Bay safe at night?
faq.a: It's generally safe with crowds around bars, but stick to lit paths and watch for pickpockets during fire shows. Travel in groups after dark.

aiContent.urgencyLine: Beachfront spots in Loh Dalum Bay, Koh Phi Phi fill up fast for fire show season from December to March — book 3 months ahead.
aiContent.methodology: We compared Loh Dalum Bay, Koh Phi Phi to Ao Nang and Railay Beach based on walkability, price level, noise, and suitability for its typical travellers. We weighted nightlife access highest because it defines the area's appeal for party-focused visitors. Last updated: 2026-04.
